{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011956B1B94FC82CC16551C150"}"},"total":566},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7556677719053206334","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，说说最后评分，我认为可以打到9.0分，然后小说值得追，但是听说一天一更，太慢了！！！一天起码40章才行！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759428981,"group_id":"7520176185209277502","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3905940548486696"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7520176185209277502","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"95"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17252,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7556658847858033470","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先说评分，四星半，四舍五入五星
可以说说我打四星半的原因。
首先，文笔一般，但是节奏不错，讲真的，书中80章已经过了半个学期了，感觉节奏可以，然后是节奏都是抓住关键点来讲的故事，无论是水鬼，还是老奶奶之类的，都是关键点，人物性格描写的很不错，比如高冷的女孩，活泼的女孩，暗地里的那种，暗恋，明恋，栏杆对话，等等等，和我的高中特别像。
然后文笔上，故事写挺好，但是文笔很平淡，没有那种小高潮。前面作文有些写的挺好的，但是后面没发现有。。。
故事创新，感觉偏校园文，有些道家的写的不错，起码我看着不会尬，可能我对道家的东西懂不多。
至于别的评论说的打广告之类的，我反倒觉得是真正的生活体现，你平时的生活中真能抛弃某音，某米这些耳熟能详的东西吗？而且那些东西确确实实就是有口碑在，想到电动车，是不是就能想到雅迪？这是一个正常的体现，难不成真写某音，某手，某迪你才乐意！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759424777,"group_id":"7520176185209277502","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"心血来潮过来注册的账号","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7u0P7qa8JN4cqoYogbP1xWFjDXgWGwBBTOt5oCDQ0+r","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cc31fc9f38084571a8ce3308dc66ebbe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880981&x-signature=32VKb5H0D4jBbfVC4kN6301NVME%3D","user_id":"3905940548486696","user_name":"安醉LC"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3905940548486696","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7520176185209277502","book_info":{"abstract":"一个平凡的高中生，机缘巧合买了一本二手道书，从此，开启了不一样的人生。

学霸人设，非爽文，非无敌文，非重生文，真实高中生活描写，所有人物智商在线，所有的情节合情合理，不涉及高武，不涉及达官贵人，不涉及各种家族，就是你我身边发生的事情。

含有修真元素，乡村鬼怪和道家传承，青春悸动交织着传说中的阴阳鬼怪，这个少年，用他的视角带你走一段不一样的精彩。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c4ada42afb6040412e8cb32a2ee42cb2","author":"小镇伯爵","author_id":"","book_id":"7520176185209277502","book_name":"修仙少年之校园日常","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7520176847548596798","read_count":"49919","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"964651"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"264","tags":"都市修真,都市,乡村,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/648cc0cd57849e9984276d6e7e76e1cf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470396&x-signature=Vcjx9WYxrPM%2BRnH4EhkWyYLXTPk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98191807875","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011956B1B94FC82CC16551C150"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13807,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":32413},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id
